name: Ember
description: EMBER is the utility token for the Ember ecosystem on Base. Ember is an autonomous AI agent that develops and deploys smart contracts, generating protocol revenue through its applications. Token holders can stake EMBER to receive a share of fees collected from all contracts built by the agent. The ecosystem currently includes a staking protocol for fee distribution, prediction markets for price speculation, voting-based AI competitions, and a tipping protocol. All contracts are deployed on Base and verified on Basescan.
